description: Promote your huge holiday sale with this colorful Christmas email template. The simplified layout and bold CTAs quickly guide customers to your website to take advantage of all the deals your business has to offer. Customize the template with your brand’s logo and send it off to the extensive email list you’ve been building all year.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.
